summary: All acceptance criteria for US-034 are satisfied by existing tests. tests/us-034/main-smoke.test.ts provides main page bootstrap smoke coverage (AC 4) using jsdom with mocked modules, testing the full bootstrap sequence including renderIntro, renderShell, and dashboard module mounting. tests/us-034/coverage-manifest.test.ts programmatically verifies that all critical test files exist for signal collectors (AC 1), scoring (AC 2), inference (AC 3), main page smoke (AC 4), and receipt rendering (AC 5). All 734 tests pass, lint is clean, and typecheck succeeds.
